seo.title: El Mundo’s Auto Service | Trusted Auto Mechanic in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Family-owned auto repair in Dallas since 1988. Expert diagnostics, brakes, AC, and engine repair. Honest pricing, quality work. Call (214) 826-3688.

hero.headline: Dallas’s Most Trusted Auto Mechanic
hero.subheadline: Expert diagnostics, brakes, AC, and engine repair – backed by decades of experience and honest pricing.

featureSections.title: Full-Service Auto Repair for Every Make & Model
featureSections.body: From routine maintenance to major engine overhauls, our ASE-certified technicians handle it all. We use state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment to pinpoint issues fast, saving you time and money.
featureSections.cardBody: We provide detailed estimates before any work begins – no surprises, no hidden fees.

featureSections.title: We Treat Your Car Like Our Own
featureSections.body: Our team believes in building long-term relationships through transparency and quality work. Every repair comes with a warranty, and we always explain what’s needed and why.
bullets: Free multi-point inspection with every service
featureSections.cardBody: We stand behind our work – if something isn’t right, we make it right.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Car Running Smoothly?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your appointment today and experience the El Mundo’s difference.

servicesPage.intro: From routine oil changes to complex engine repairs, El Mundo’s Auto Service offers a full range of auto repair services. Our ASE-certified technicians use the latest diagnostic tools to get you back on the road safely and quickly.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and expert engine repair for all makes and models.
services.longDescription: Our advanced diagnostic equipment quickly identifies engine issues, from check engine lights to performance problems. We repair or replace components with precision, ensuring your engine runs smoothly.
benefits: Pinpoint accuracy saves time and money

process.title: Comprehensive Scan
process.description: We connect your vehicle to our diagnostic system to read error codes and perform a full system analysis.

process.title: Detailed Explanation
process.description: Our technician explains the issue, shows you the data, and provides a clear estimate before any work begins.

process.title: Precision Repair
process.description: We repair or replace faulty components using factory-approved methods, then test-drive to confirm the fix.

faqs.question: Why is my check engine light on?
faqs.answer: It could be anything from a loose gas cap to a serious engine problem. We’ll run a diagnostic to find the exact cause.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics are completed within an hour. If repairs are needed, we’ll provide a timeline.

services.title: Brake Service & Repair
services.shortDescription: Reliable brake inspections, pad replacement, and rotor resurfacing.
services.longDescription: Your safety depends on your brakes. We inspect pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid levels, then recommend the right service. Whether it’s a simple pad swap or a full brake overhaul, we ensure stopping power you can trust.
benefits: Thorough inspection of entire brake system
High-quality pads and rotors for quiet, smooth braking
Competitive pricing with no hidden fees
Lifetime warranty on brake pads available

process.title: Visual & Mechanical Inspection
process.description: We check pad thickness, rotor condition, caliper function, and brake fluid level.

process.title: Recommendation & Estimate
process.description: Based on wear and tear, we recommend the best course of action and provide a written estimate.

process.title: Professional Installation
process.description: We install new components, bleed the system if needed, and test brakes on the road.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brakes?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000–50,000 miles, but it depends on driving habits. We’ll check them during every visit.

faqs.question: What are signs my brakes need service?
faqs.answer: Squealing, grinding, vibration, or a soft brake pedal. If you notice any of these, bring your car in immediately.

services.title: AC & Heating System Repair
services.shortDescription: Keep your cabin comfortable with expert AC and heater service.
services.longDescription: Texas heat demands a working AC. We diagnose and repair air conditioning and heating systems, from refrigerant leaks to compressor failures. Our team restores comfort quickly, so you stay cool in summer and warm in winter.
benefits: Full system pressure test and leak detection
Heater core and blower motor repair
Fast turnaround – most AC repairs done same day

process.title: System Evaluation
process.description: We check refrigerant levels, compressor function, and airflow to identify the problem.

process.title: Leak Detection & Repair
process.description: Using UV dye and electronic detectors, we find and fix leaks, then recharge the system.

process.title: Performance Test
process.description: We run the system to ensure proper cooling/heating and check for any remaining issues.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or a clogged condenser. We’ll diagnose the exact issue.

faqs.question: How often should I service my AC?
faqs.answer: We recommend an annual check-up, especially before summer, to ensure peak performance.

services.title: Routine Maintenance & Tune-Ups
services.shortDescription: Keep your car running efficiently with scheduled maintenance.
services.longDescription: Preventative maintenance extends the life of your vehicle. We offer oil changes, fluid flushes, belt replacements, spark plug services, and multi-point inspections. Stay on schedule with our reminders.
benefits: Extends engine life and improves fuel economy

process.title: Review Service Schedule
process.description: We check your manufacturer’s recommended maintenance intervals and your vehicle’s history.

process.title: Perform Services
process.description: We complete all required items – oil change, filter replacement, fluid top-offs, and inspections.

process.title: Final Check & Report
process.description: We provide a detailed report of what was done and note any future recommendations.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most modern cars need oil every 5,000–7,500 miles. We’ll recommend the best interval for your vehicle.

faqs.question: What is included in a tune-up?
faqs.answer: Typically spark plugs, air filter, fuel system cleaning, and a full inspection. We customize based on your car’s needs.

about.headline: Your Trusted Dallas Auto Repair Experts
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair that keeps our community safe on the road.
story: El Mundo’s Auto Service opened its doors in 1988 with a simple mission: offer reliable, affordable car repairs with integrity. Founded by a family of mechanics, the shop quickly earned a reputation for thorough diagnostics and fair pricing. Over three decades, we’ve served thousands of Dallas drivers, from first-time car owners to multi-generational families who trust us with their vehicles.

Today, we continue that legacy with a team of ASE-certified technicians and a commitment to transparency. We invest in the latest diagnostic tools and ongoing training to handle everything from classic cars to modern hybrids. At El Mundo’s, you’re not just a customer – you’re part of our family.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always tell you what your car needs – and what it doesn’t.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use premium parts and follow manufacturer specifications for every repair.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support local businesses and treat every customer like a neighbor.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We stand by our work with warranties and a promise to make it right.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: We’re here to answer your questions and schedule your appointment.
